prompt: Generate a coffee shop receipt screenshot using the itemized list layout from the first image and the logo from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a coffee shop receipt. Adopt the full itemized list layout from image 1, including its centered header section for date and time, the right-aligned item prices, the tax and total sections, and the 'Thank you for visiting!' footer message. Integrate the 'CoffeeShop' logo from image 2 at the top center of the receipt, replacing the 'Joe's Diner' text. Ensure the itemized list displays typical coffee shop products (e.g., coffee, pastries, sandwiches) rather than diner food.
objects: centered header section for date and time
coffee shop products (e.g., coffee, pastries, sandwiches)
